title: landolphia rufescens
intro: Landolphia rufescens, also known as the African cherry or red-barked landolphia, is a species of evergreen shrub or small tree native to tropical Africa. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its bark, which contains various bioactive compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Landolphia rufescens include its potential use in treating fever, rheumatism, and other ailments, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is prepared by boiling its bark in water to create a decoction, which can be used as a treatment for various health conditions.
